mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_verifications ( user_uuid, user_email, verification_code, purpose, verified, used, attempt_count, expiry_date ) VALUES ( #{userUuid}, #{userEmail}, #{verificationCode}, COALESCE(#{purpose}, 'PASSWORD_RESET'), #{verified}, #{used}, #{attemptCount}, #{expiryDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM email_verifications WHERE user_email = #{userEmail} AND purpose = 'PASSWORD_RESET' AND used = FALSE ORDER BY verification_no DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE email_verifications SET verified = TRUE, verified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE verification_no = #{verificationNo}
UPDATE email_verifications SET used = TRUE, used_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE verification_no = #{verificationNo}
UPDATE email_verifications SET used = TRUE, used_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_uuid = #{userUuid} AND purpose = #{purpose} AND used = FALSE
